posts.text: Eugene Daniels asked Don Lemon directly — when the White House posted a lemon emoji and chains after your arrest, what did that mean to you as a Black man? Don's answer will stop you cold. A friend told him exactly what was happening — and he didn't sugarcoat it. The First Amendment is not up for debate. 🎙️ #ClockIt #DonLemon #MSNow #FirstAmendment #FreedomOfThePress
